title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on the future of entertainment and media.

questions.question: Do you think traditional media such as newspapers and television will survive in the age of the internet?
Is the huge amount of entertainment content available online a positive thing, or does it cause problems?
Some people worry that streaming services and social media are making people less likely to engage with challenging or serious content. Do you agree?

script.text: Do you think traditional media such as newspapers and television will survive in the age of the internet?
Is the huge amount of entertainment content available online a positive thing, or does it cause problems?
Some people worry that streaming services and social media are making people less likely to engage with challenging or serious content. Do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
